name: Mizoram PSC – Junior Accounts Officer – 10 Posts

basic_details.job_title: Mizoram PSC Junior Accounts Officer Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 10 Posts
basic_details.short_information: Mizoram Public Service Commission (Mizoram PSC) Recruitment 2026 for 10 posts of Junior Accounts Officer (JAO). Candidates with Bachelor’s degree Can Apply Online. The last date to apply online is 05-06-2026. The candidate shall apply online through Mizoram PSC official website mpsc.mizoram.gov.in/.

qualification.education_qualification: Bachelor’s degree from a recognised University, Computer Proficiency as per Mizoram Group ‘A’, ‘B’ and ‘C’ posts Service/Recruitment Rules 2023, Mizo Language Proficiency (exempted if studied Mizo in HSLC or above)

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the Mizoram PSC Junior Accounts Officer (JAO) Recruitment 2026.
